_comment: DRIVN media manifest (cinema.md Phase 1) — every film/episode/trailer/clip the game can play is a ROW here. Written by MediaForge (node tools/mediaforge/server.mjs, :8897); safe to hand-edit. encoded_path MUST be Theora .ogv (the only video Godot gl_compatibility plays). Music is NOT rowed — game/media/music/{radio,game} folders are the playlists. unlock_type: always_available | found_dvd | found_tape | found_reel | quest_reward | regional_channel | world_event. screen_context: safehouse_tv | drive_in | public_tv | news.
